privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying the synthetic sample project file '/home/ga/Projects/current_task.xml'. It has been verified that a new task named 'Pre-Inspection Walkthrough' with a duration of 2 days must be inserted immediately before the task 'Complete Final Inspections' which corresponds to UID 137.
